property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\Kuroo\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.6\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platforms;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\tools;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\emulator;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.6\bin;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP;C:\app\Kuroo\product\21c\dbhomeXE\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.2.4\bin;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platforms;C:\Users\Kuroo\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\tools;C:\Users\Kuroo\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: testParallel
